title: Most Populous County in the U.S. Goes Live with Tyler Technologies' Enterprise Supervision Solution
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced the County of Los Angeles, California, has successfully gone live with Tyler's Enterprise Supervision solution.

title: Iowa Department for the Blind Selects Tyler Technologies' Vocational Rehabilitation Solution
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has signed an agreement with the Iowa Department for the Blind for Tyler's Vocational Rehabilitation solution.

title: Tyler Technologies, Inc. (TYL) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Tyler Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:TYL ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 16, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Hala Elsherbini - Senior Director of IR Lynn Moore - President & CEO Brian Miller - CFO Conference Call Participants Sami Badri - Credit Suisse Rob Oliver - Baird Matt VanVliet - BTIG Peter Heckmann - D.A. Davidson Alex Zukin - Wolfe Research Gabriella Borges - Goldman Sachs Saket Kalia - Barclays Jonathan Ho - William Blair Terry Tillman - Truist Securities Joshua Reilly - Needham Keith Housum - Northcoast Research Operator Hello, and welcome to today's Tyler Technologies Fourth Quarter 2022 Conference Call.

title: Tyler's (TYL) Q4 Earnings Miss, Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Tyler's (TYL) fourth-quarter results reflect the benefits of heightened subscription arrangements with the company continuing its transformation to a fully SaaS-based model from a license-based model.

title: Tyler Technologies (TYL) Lags Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Tyler Technologies (TYL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -4.60% and 0.02%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Tyler Technologies Reports Earnings for Fourth Quarter 2022
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announces its fourth quarter 2022 earnings.

title: Tyler Technologies: Great Vision. Fully Valued
text: Tyler Technologies operates in a still largely unknown space. This is the perfect perpetual business but is also unlikely to go on a growth (EPS) spree.

title: Tyler Technologies Named to America's Greatest Workplaces for Diversity List
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has been named to America's Greatest Workplaces for Diversity list for 2023.

title: Dallas Fort Worth International Airport Goes Live with Tyler Technologies' Permitting & Licensing Solution
